subject: General Knowledge
question_text: Which Indian space mission was the first to successfully land a rover near the lunar south pole?

step_by_step: It successfully performed a soft landing on the Moon's South Pole in August 2023.

subject: General Knowledge
question_text: What is the primary objective of the 'PM-KUSUM' scheme launched by the Government of India?

step_by_step: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthaan Mahabhiyan (PM-KUSUM) aims to ensure energy security for farmers.
It focuses on replacing diesel pumps with solar-powered irrigation systems.

subject: General Knowledge
question_text: What is the name of India's first dedicated solar mission, launched to study the Sun's atmosphere?

step_by_step: Aditya-L1 was launched by ISRO in September 2023.
It is placed in a halo orbit around the Lagrange point 1 (L1) of the Sun-Earth system.

subject: General Knowledge
question_text: The 'Ayushman Bharat - PMJAY' scheme provides health insurance coverage up to how much per family per year?

step_by_step: PMJAY provides a cover of Rs. 5 lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.

subject: General Knowledge
question_text: Which of the following is the intended goal of ISRO's 'Gaganyaan' mission?

options.text: To send a rover to Mars
To establish a base on the Moon
To launch a new constellation of 5G satellites

step_by_step: Gaganyaan is India's first manned space mission.
It aims to send a 3-member crew to an orbit of 400 km for a 3-day mission.

subject: General Knowledge
question_text: Which scheme was launched to provide bank accounts to every household in India, ensuring financial inclusion?

step_by_step: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY) ensures access to financial services like savings accounts, credit, insurance, and pensions.

subject: General Knowledge
question_text: The 'LihP' (Lunar Integrated Polar Exploration) mission is a joint collaboration between ISRO and which other space agency?

step_by_step: LUPEX (also known as Chandrayaan-4 concept) is a robotic lunar mission to explore the South Pole region.
It is a joint mission between India (ISRO) and Japan (JAXA).

subject: General Knowledge
question_text: What is the primary goal of the 'Make in India' initiative?

options.text: To transform India into a global manufacturing hub
To provide free internet to every village
To build smart cities across the country

solution.final_answer: To transform India into a global manufacturing hub

step_by_step: Make in India aims to encourage multi-national and domestic companies to manufacture their products in India.

subject: General Knowledge
question_text: Which satellite is primarily used for providing TV broadcasting and telecommunication services across India?

step_by_step: INSAT (Indian National Satellite System) is a series of multipurpose geostationary satellites used for telecommunications, broadcasting, and meteorology.
